title: bromus piananensis
intro: Bromus piananensis, also known as Pianan Brome or Pianan Wild Brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of China, traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune system function. In traditional Chinese medicine, Bromus piananensis is often prepared as a tea or decoction, or used in combination with other herbs to create herbal remedies, although its modern use and efficacy have yet to be extensively scientifically studied.
intro_study: According to "The Korean journal of internal medicine", bromus piananensis is a component of the combined product HL301, which was found to be effective in treating acute bronchitis by reducing symptoms such as cough, sputum, and chest pain, and improving the quality of life for patients.
